hub_subtitle: Business English para Missões Internacionais e Pequenos Negócios

lesson.menu_desc: Ask for and give information at an event with polite can and could requests -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 11 -- Asking for and Giving Information
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Flávia Florêncio Ferreira | Lesson 11 -- Asking for and Giving Information
lesson.grammar_point: can / could for polite requests (asking for and giving information)

listenings.text: Welcome to the Sebrae Business Fair. Here is some information to help you today. The registration desk is at the main entrance, on the first floor. Please go there to get your badge. The main hall is on the second floor. You can use the elevator or the stairs. The restrooms are next to the information desk. If you need help, you can ask our team at any time. Could you please wear your badge all day? Enjoy the fair!

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the fair. Do you need information? No problem. You can come to the information desk at any time, and you can ask us anything. Could you tell us your name at the desk, please? Then we can give you a badge and a map. The map shows you all the directions and every hall. If you cannot find a room, just look for the signs, or ask a member of our team. Have a great day!

extra_audio.text: First, I arrive at the main entrance of the fair. Then, I go to the registration desk to get my badge. Next, I ask the assistant for directions to the main hall. After that, I take the elevator to the second floor. Finally, I find my seat and I read the schedule of the day.
